messages.content:
Here are our 60 open issues with their comment threads. Which ones are P0 authentication bugs that should be fixed this week? List the issue numbers.

#1300  Login fails with 401 after token refresh — users locked out
state: open   labels: bug, auth, regression, priority/P0   author: @maria-k   opened: 2026-06-01

Since the 1.8.0 deploy users get logged out mid-session: after the access token refreshes, the next request returns 401 and the app bounces to /login. ~3% of sessions affected.
  └─ @devops-sam: confirmed in prod. The auth middleware rejects the refreshed JWT — `iat` is a few seconds in the future (clock skew between the signer and the API).
  └─ @maria-k: our `nbf`/`iat` check has zero leeway. We should allow ~30s clock skew in verifyToken().
  └─ @oncall: bumping to P0, customer escalations coming in.

----------------------------------------

#1299  Typo in onboarding email ("recieve")
state: open   labels: docs, good-first-issue   author: @devops-sam   opened: 2026-06-02

Minor copy fix in templates/welcome.html line 24.
  └─ @tomek: agreed, low priority — can wait for next sprint.
  └─ @maria-k: added to the backlog, not blocking the release.

----------------------------------------

#1298  Bump axios 1.6.2 -> 1.7.4
state: open   labels: dependencies   author: @li-wei   opened: 2026-06-03

Dependabot: patches a follow-redirects advisory. CI green.
  └─ @priya-r: agreed, low priority — can wait for next sprint.
  └─ @maria-k: added to the backlog, not blocking the release.

----------------------------------------

#1297  Flaky test: checkout.e2e "applies coupon"
state: open   labels: test, flaky   author: @priya-r   opened: 2026-06-04

Fails ~1 in 20 on CI, passes locally. Likely a race on the toast assertion.
  └─ @li-wei: agreed, low priority — can wait for next sprint.
  └─ @maria-k: added to the backlog, not blocking the release.

----------------------------------------

#1296  Slow /api/products on cold cache
state: open   labels: performance   author: @tomek   opened: 2026-06-05

p95 ~800ms after a deploy until the cache warms; not user-blocking.
  └─ @tomek: agreed, low priority — can wait for next sprint.
  └─ @maria-k: added to the backlog, not blocking the release.

----------------------------------------

#1295  Add empty-state illustration to cart
state: open   labels: enhancement, ui, design   author: @security-lee   opened: 2026-06-06

Cart shows a bare "0 items" string; design has an SVG ready.
  └─ @priya-r: agreed, low priority — can wait for next sprint.
  └─ @maria-k: added to the backlog, not blocking the release.

----------------------------------------

#1294  README: update local setup for Node 20
state: open   labels: docs   author: @maria-k   opened: 2026-06-07

The setup steps still say Node 18; `engines` is now >=20.
  └─ @li-wei: agreed, low priority — can wait for next sprint.
  └─ @maria-k: added to the backlog, not blocking the release.

----------------------------------------

#1293  Sentry noise: ResizeObserver loop limit
state: open   labels: observability, low-priority   author: @devops-sam   opened: 2026-06-08

Benign browser warning flooding Sentry; add to ignore list.
  └─ @tomek: agreed, low priority — can wait for next sprint.
  └─ @maria-k: added to the backlog, not blocking the release.

----------------------------------------

#1292  Inconsistent date format on invoices
state: open   labels: bug, ui   author: @li-wei   opened: 2026-06-09

Some invoices render MM/DD, others DD/MM depending on locale.
  └─ @priya-r: agreed, low priority — can wait for next sprint.
  └─ @maria-k: added to the backlog, not blocking the release.

----------------------------------------

state: open   labels: enhancement   author: @priya-r   opened: 2026-06-01

Ops wants a CSV export button on the orders table.

  └─ @maria-k: added to the backlog, not blocking the release.

#1281  SSO (SAML) users can bypass MFA enrollment
state: open   labels: bug, auth, security, priority/P0   author: @devops-sam   opened: 2026-06-02

A user logging in via SAML skips the MFA-enrollment gate that password users hit. Reported by security review.
  └─ @security-lee: reproducible — the MFA gate is only checked in the password flow, not the SSO callback.
  └─ @maria-k: need to move the enrollment check into the shared session-establish path.

----------------------------------------
